params.prompt: A premium ornate fantasy game UI title nameplate (player title banner / 铭牌), horizontal wide layout. Use the SAME structure and format as reference image 1 (the gold winged title plate): one long horizontal decorative plate with a central top crest emblem, symmetrical decorative wing-like flourishes spreading from both left and right sides, an ornate golden metallic border with glossy highlights, and a smooth EMPTY inner panel area meant for title text. THEME = World Cup champion 'Peak of the World': the central top crest is a stylized golden championship trophy with a laurel wreath and a soccer ball, matching the style of reference image 2 (gold trophy + laurel + football). Color scheme = champion gold combined with emerald football-pitch green; glowing gold accents; laurel leaves and small golden footballs woven into the side flourishes. The inner panel is a smooth emerald-to-gold gradient, completely EMPTY with absolutely NO text. Polished 3D cartoon game-art rendering, clean crisp outlines, vibrant, high detail. Background OUTSIDE the plate is plain/solid for easy cutout. ONE single horizontal nameplate only, do NOT generate a grid or multiple plates. Reject: no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermark, no national flags, no FIFA logo, no realistic photo, no scene background.
